---
title: "Common Code 03 — Basic ggplot2"
subtitle: "Scatter plots, boxplots, labels, colour, shapes, axis limits, themes, and saving"
description: "Build scatter plots and boxplots, map colour and shape, set axis limits, apply themes, and save figures."
author: "Bill Perry"
title-block-banner: true
page-layout: full

format:
  html:
    toc: false
    downloads: []
    embed-resources: false
    self-contained: false

listing:
  contents: "*/**.qmd"
  type: table
  sort: "title asc"
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
---
---
